scripts.decks:compile: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build && node ../../packages/decks/dist/bin.js compile --root decks --out app/generated --mount /decks
scripts.decks:compile:dev: bun run --cwd ../../packages/decks build -- --clean=false && node ../../packages/decks/dist/bin.js compile --root decks --out app/generated --mount /decks
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
